# Bug Report

This issue tracker is a tool to address bugs in olink itself.
Please use GitHub Discussions for questions about your own code or general usage.

Replace this comment with a clear outline of what the bug is.
-->

## How to Reproduce

<!--
Describe how to replicate the bug.

Please provide a minimal reproducible example: the exact command(s) you ran,
and the contents of the relevant project files (e.g. `pyproject.toml`, `package.json`,
`.git/config`) that olink reads.

Include the full traceback if there was an exception. For example:

```shell
$ olink pypi
...
```
-->

<!--
Describe the expected behavior that should have happened but didn't.
What URL did you expect olink to open?
-->

## Environment

- olink version: [e.g. 0.1.0 — `olink --version`]
- python version: [e.g. 3.14]
- operating system: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- shell: [e.g. zsh, bash, PowerShell]
